TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Cikawasay, title = Cikawasay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cikawasay} }

S.FORM: == Cikawasay == o cicawasay hananay^ i,malecad to ising no aniniay ko tatodonng no piharateng no iti:ay'ayho a'amis a tamdaw.nawhani,o mamiadah to adadaay ko demak no cikawasay.saka ,ano ira ko adadaay a tamdaw^ i,tangsol saan a mitahidang to cikawasay a misalising a papiadah to adadaay a tamdaw. Nikawrira ,onini a cikawasay^ i,caay ka o nanilongocan nira ko sakacikawas nira. O kawas ko cu^cu sanay a mirawod saan i tamdaw a pa'araw. papitodongen nira ko tamdaw a papisakero' to kero' nira a misatakodtakod a romadiw.ano cima ko pakatodongay a tamdaw to kero ato radiw nira^ i,o raan a tamdaw ko kaolahan nira a pasifana' to sapitahidang noya tamdaw i cingranan a masakero.itini i pisakro'an nangra a pasifana' ko kawas toya tamdaw tono kawas a sowal.tona ira a misaraoraod sa kona kawas toya kaolahan nira a tamdaw saka,samatiya sato o malawidongay cangra a manganga'ay. Yo ira sato ko adadaay a tamdaw i paro no loma' nira^i, tahidangen nira koya kawas a milongoc to sapiadahaw nira, saka tangsol saan a ira koya kawas a miraod i cingranan ta masakero cangra a romadiw. Ta todongen kako a misa'ir to adadaay han noya kawas.saka, todong han nira ko demak noya cikawasay^i,maadah koya adadaay.saka, salipahak sato koya tamdaw.haloya kawas a lipahak toya tamdaw.saka,itiya a mapatorod no kawas ko tamdaw to sapiadah to adadaay a'icel. Nanoya, cingra sato ko 'arawen no finawlan a papiadah to adadaay. Cingra ko sa'ayaway a cikawasay no pangcah.mahaen ko lalengatan no saki ira no cikawasay no'amis. Oya kawas^i,o'afang noya cikawasay. Saka,ano awaay ko'afang no cikawasay^i,awaay ko^poc no cikawasay a miadah to adadaay. Nikawrira.caay ka lecad ko demak no 'afang. Saka, masasiroma' ko demak no cikawasay a miadah to adadaay. Ira ko pinapina a kasasiroma no demak no cikawasay a miadah to adadaay.malecad ato demak no ising konini, nawhani,adihay ko kasasiromaroma no adada.saka, mahaen to ko nika adihay no kasasiromaroma no demak no cikawasay. Ano ira ko adadaay no loma'^i,tayra i cikawasay a mi'araw.ta o cikawasay a tamdaw ko misifdihay.onini a pisifdih^i,o pikilim to tatapangan no adada ato samaanen ko demak ta maadah sanay. Ano mahapinang to ko pisifdih noya cikawasay^i,o cikawasay ko pahapinangay to nika sasamaanen ko demak saan. Saka cecay^i,maralisanay.onini a maralisan hananay^i, o cifa^detay a adada. O ci^doyay a adada konini. Tatolo, sapat ko cikawasay a midemak to ci^doyay a adada. Saka tosa^i, pasakawihan.mapolong koya cikawasay a misaliway ta midemak tonini. Saka tolo^i,mipangagang. O adada no fa^lohay a mihofocan a wawa;o sapifalicaw aca pangangan toya adadaay a wawa. Saka sepat^i,pakirikiri.onini^i,o saki mala^caay ko adada a tamdaw.mikapot koya adadaay i cikawasay i polong no demak nangra.sairen no cikawasay cingra. Saka lima^i,mipalio'c.o tatodong no pipalio'c no cikawasay ko demak tonini misair a mipuhpuh to tati'ih no ciadadaay a tamdaw. Saka ^nem^i,talakilang.o cecay no pipakalemed to picomod to fa^lohay a loma' Saka pito^i,pasa'orongan. Saka falo^i,mifodo'.o mitapalay to mapatayay. Saka siwa^i,pamalataw.adihay ko demak nonini a papimalataw hananay.o cecay^i,napakapatayay to tamdaw, ano citafaday a tamdaw ato namilooday a tamdaw^i,saerien no cikawasay cangra.o romasato,ano patireng to fa^lohay a kakomodan noniyaro'^I, pamalataw to sakafana'aw nira a paplo ato mafana' a mikowan to niyaro'. Saka mo^tep^I,o pa'aw'aw.onini a pa'aw'aw hananay^I,o todong no pitahidang to'adingo no mipalafangay a wawa ato talaomahay a wawa. Saka safaw cecay^I,pahemay.onini a pipahemay hananay^I,o pina'ang to kinayra no omah. Tala'ayaw a mina'ang^I,ira ko demak no cikawasay.o tatodongto no pisair no cikawasay to taknawan a mipakalemed to sakacikakaenen no loma'. Saka safaw tosa^I,pasma^ta'.onini^I,ano tatiih ko nisatiihay^I,papisair to cikawasay ta mapalasawad koya tatiihay a demak. Saka safaw tolo^I,misaodo'.onini^I,pipasadak to faniw . Saka safaw sepa't^I,milangaw.ano masiday ko maan a kakalimelaan a lalosidan,ano matakaw ko ^ekim ato tada^kim^I,papikilim han ko cikawasay to masidayay a maamaan. Ta ma'araw noya cikawasay ko cima ko mitakaway,ta ira icowa konini a lalosidan saan. Saka safaw lima^i.mifaliloh.onini^I,mifafah to tatiih no loma'.tinako sa^I,ci'iro koya loma';mipadoka' to cimacimaan^I,sahto o tatiihay a demak ko iraay noya loma',ta tahidangen ko cikawasay a papifahfah to tatiih no loma'. Saka safaw ^nem^I,niwatid. Ano ira ko mapatayay^I, mararom sa ko faloco' no loma'.caay ka hinom ko faloco' tona cimapatayay ko loma'. Ta tahidangen ko cikawasay a papifahfah tonini a rarom no paro no loma'. Saka safaw pito^i,sakap.onini a sakap hananay^i,o halafinay a doka' ato congras. Tahidangen ko cikawasay a papicepcep toya doka' ano^ca'I o congras ta mapasadak noya cikawasay koya mitngeday I o^o'. Saka safaw falo^I,pakawas.onini a pakawas hananay^I, halafinay a adada;malawaco ko tileng to nika adada. Ta papisairen to cikawasay.pakawas hananay konini a demak. Saka safaw siwa^I,mifahfah.mapolong ko finawlan a masadak a midemak tonini a papifahfah to tatiihay a kawas hananay .onini^I,o carawcaraw,o tofotofo ato romaroma.saka,misoni a ma^min ko kalo loma' a dodang ato takinkingan. Ta matalaw toya soni koya tatiihay a kawas. Saka tosa a polo^I,mitapohay .onini^i,mifahfah to onih no pinaloma itini i omaomahan. Sairen no cikawasay ta mapalasawad ko mikari'angay to pinaloma no omah. Saka tosa polo'ira ko cecay^I,pasaorongan.onini^i, awaayto ko angil tona halafin ko adada. O papatikoen cingra a paki^mel to tireng to sakatanektek no tireng. Saka tosa polo'ira ko tosa^I,pasawa'eran.o nika^ca ka 'imel i pihafayan saka,malifawa ko tiyad.saka, mipohpoh tonini a adada nira. O kawas no cikawasay,oya'afang nangra^i,ci afowakay, ci cingacingaw ato romaroma. O tatatoyen no cikawasay a misair to adadaay^i, o papah no 'adiyam ato papah no lo'oh. O siwalaan ko piparoan to ^pah to sapitoripes nangrra.
S.PHON: == ʦikawasaj == o~u ʦiʦawasaj ħananajʔ i,maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u isiŋ no~u aniniaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~unŋ no~u piħaratəŋ no~u iti:ajʡajħo~u aʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw.nawħani,o~u mamiaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦikawasaj.saka ,ano~u ira ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮawʔ i,taŋso~uɾ saan a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ʦikawasaj a misaɾisiŋ a papiaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. nikawrira ,o~unini a ʦikawasajʔ i,ʦaaj ka o~u naniɾo~uŋo~uʦan nira ko~u sakaʦikawas nira. o~u kawas ko~u ʦo~u~uʔʦo~u~u sanaj a mirawo~uɬ~ɮ saan i tamɬ~ɮaw a paʡaraw. papito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən nira ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a papisakəro~uʡ to~u kəro~uʡ nira a misatako~uɬ~ɮtako~uɬ~ɮ a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw.ano~u ʦima ko~u pakato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kəro~u ato~u raɬ~ɮiw niraʔ i,o~u raan a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kao~uɾaħan nira a pasifanaʡ to~u sapitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~uja tamɬ~ɮaw i ʦiŋranan a masakəro~u.itini i pisakro~uʡan naŋra a pasifanaʡ ko~u kawas to~uja tamɬ~ɮaw to~uno~u kawas a so~uwaɾ.to~una ira a misarao~urao~uɬ~ɮ sa ko~una kawas to~uja kao~uɾaħan nira a tamɬ~ɮaw saka,samatija sato~u o~u maɾawiɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦaŋra a maŋaŋaʡaj. jo~u ira sato~u ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ niraʔi, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən nira ko~uja kawas a miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sapiaɬ~ɮaħaw nira, saka taŋso~uɾ saan a ira ko~uja kawas a mirao~uɬ~ɮ i ʦiŋranan ta masakəro~u ʦaŋra a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw. ta to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən kako~u a misaʡir to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ħan no~uja kawas.saka, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħan nira ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~uja ʦikawasajʔi,maaɬ~ɮaħ ko~uja aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj.saka, saɾipaħak sato~u ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw.ħaɾo~uja kawas a ɾipaħak to~uja tamɬ~ɮaw.saka,itija a mapato~uro~uɬ~ɮ no~u kawas ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u sapiaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj aʡiʦəɾ. nano~uja, ʦiŋra sato~u ko~u ʡarawən no~u finawɾan a papiaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. ʦiŋra ko~u saʡajawaj a ʦikawasaj no~u paŋʦaħ.maħaən ko~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u saki ira no~u ʦikawasaj no~uʡamis. o~uja kawasʔi,o~uʡafaŋ no~uja ʦikawasaj. saka,ano~u awaaj ko~uʡafaŋ no~u ʦikawasajʔi,awaaj ko~uʔpo~uʦ no~u ʦikawasaj a miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. nikawrira.ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʡafaŋ. saka, masasiro~umaʡ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦikawasaj a miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. ira ko~u pinapina a kasasiro~uma no~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦikawasaj a miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj.maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ato~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u isiŋ ko~unini, nawħani,aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa.saka, maħaən to~u ko~u nika aɬ~ɮiħaj no~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦikawasaj. ano~u ira ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj no~u ɾo~umaʡʔi,tajra i ʦikawasaj a miʡaraw.ta o~u ʦikawasaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u misifɬ~ɮiħaj.o~unini a pisifɬ~ɮiħʔi,o~u pikiɾim to~u tatapaŋan no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ato~u samaanən ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ta maaɬ~ɮaħ sanaj. ano~u maħapinaŋ to~u ko~u pisifɬ~ɮiħ no~uja ʦikawasajʔi,o~u ʦikawasaj ko~u paħapinaŋaj to~u nika sasamaanən ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak saan. saka ʦəʦajʔi,maraɾisanaj.o~unini a maraɾisan ħananajʔi, o~u ʦifaʔɬ~ɮətaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. o~u ʦiʔɬ~ɮo~ujaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ko~unini. tato~uɾo~u, sapat ko~u ʦikawasaj a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u ʦiʔɬ~ɮo~ujaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. saka to~usaʔi, pasakawiħan.mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~uja ʦikawasaj a misaɾiwaj ta miɬ~ɮəmak to~unini. saka to~uɾo~uʔi,mipaŋa*aŋ. o~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u faʔɾo~uħaj a miħo~ufo~uʦan a wawa;o~u sapifaɾiʦaw aʦa paŋaŋan to~uja aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a wawa. saka səpatʔi,pakirikiri.o~uniniʔi,o~u saki maɾaʔʦaaj ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a tamɬ~ɮaw.mikapo~ut ko~uja aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj i ʦikawasaj i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak naŋra.sairən no~u ʦikawasaj ʦiŋra. saka ɾimaʔi,mipaɾio~uʡʦ.o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u pipaɾio~uʡʦ no~u ʦikawasaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak to~unini misair a mipo~u~uħpo~u~uħ to~u tatiʡiħ no~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. saka ʔnəmʔi,taɾakiɾaŋ.o~u ʦəʦaj no~u pipakaɾəməɬ~ɮ to~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u faʔɾo~uħaj a ɾo~umaʡ saka pito~uʔi,pasaʡo~uro~uŋan. saka faɾo~uʔi,mifo~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ.o~u mitapaɾaj to~u mapatajaj. saka siwaʔi,pamaɾataw.aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~unini a papimaɾataw ħananaj.o~u ʦəʦajʔi,napakapatajaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u ʦitafaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u namiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮawʔi,saəriən no~u ʦikawasaj ʦaŋra.o~u ro~umasato~u,ano~u patirəŋ to~u faʔɾo~uħaj a kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~unijaro~uʡʔi, pamaɾataw to~u sakafanaʡaw nira a papɾo~u ato~u mafanaʡ a miko~uwan to~u nijaro~uʡ. saka mo~uʔtəpʔi,o~u paʡawʡaw.o~unini a paʡawʡaw ħananajʔi,o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u no~u mipaɾafaŋaj a wawa ato~u taɾao~umaħaj a wawa. saka safaw ʦəʦajʔi,paħəmaj.o~unini a pipaħəmaj ħananajʔi,o~u pinaʡaŋ to~u kinajra no~u o~umaħ. taɾaʡajaw a minaʡaŋʔi,ira ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦikawasaj.o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋto~u no~u pisair no~u ʦikawasaj to~u taknawan a mipakaɾəməɬ~ɮ to~u sakaʦikakaənən no~u ɾo~umaʡ. saka safaw to~usaʔi,pasmaʔtaʡ.o~uniniʔi,ano~u tatiiħ ko~u nisatiiħajʔi,papisair to~u ʦikawasaj ta mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~uja tatiiħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. saka safaw to~uɾo~uʔi,misao~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ.o~uniniʔi,pipasaɬ~ɮak to~u faniw . saka safaw səpaʡtʔi,miɾaŋaw.ano~u masiɬ~ɮaj ko~u maan a kakaɾiməɾaan a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan,ano~u matakaw ko~u ʔəkim ato~u taɬ~ɮaʔkimʔi,papikiɾim ħan ko~u ʦikawasaj to~u masiɬ~ɮajaj a maamaan. ta maʡaraw no~uja ʦikawasaj ko~u ʦima ko~u mitakawaj,ta ira iʦo~uwa ko~unini a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan saan. saka safaw ɾimaʔi.mifaɾiɾo~uħ.o~uniniʔi,mifafaħ to~u tatiiħ no~u ɾo~umaʡ.tinako~u saʔi,ʦiʡiro~u ko~uja ɾo~umaʡ;mipaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ to~u ʦimaʦimaanʔi,saħto~u o~u tatiiħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u iraaj no~uja ɾo~umaʡ,ta taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ko~u ʦikawasaj a papifaħfaħ to~u tatiiħ no~u ɾo~umaʡ. saka safaw ʔnəmʔi,niwatiɬ~ɮ. ano~u ira ko~u mapatajajʔi, mararo~um sa ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u ɾo~umaʡ.ʦaaj ka ħino~um ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~una ʦimapatajaj ko~u ɾo~umaʡ. ta taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ko~u ʦikawasaj a papifaħfaħ to~unini a raro~um no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ. saka safaw pito~uʔi,sakap.o~unini a sakap ħananajʔi,o~u ħaɾafinaj a ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ato~u ʦo~uŋras. taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ko~u ʦikawasaj a papiʦəpʦəp to~uja ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ano~uʔʦaʡi o~u ʦo~uŋras ta mapasaɬ~ɮak no~uja ʦikawasaj ko~uja mitŋəɬ~ɮaj i o~uʔo~uʡ. saka safaw faɾo~uʔi,pakawas.o~unini a pakawas ħananajʔi, ħaɾafinaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa;maɾawaʦo~u ko~u tiɾəŋ to~u nika aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. ta papisairən to~u ʦikawasaj.pakawas ħananaj ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak. saka safaw siwaʔi,mifaħfaħ.mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u finawɾan a masaɬ~ɮak a miɬ~ɮəmak to~unini a papifaħfaħ to~u tatiiħaj a kawas ħananaj .o~uniniʔi,o~u ʦarawʦaraw,o~u to~ufo~uto~ufo~u ato~u ro~umaro~uma.saka,miso~uni a maʔmin ko~u kaɾo~u ɾo~umaʡ a ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮaŋ ato~u takinkiŋan. ta mataɾaw to~uja so~uni ko~uja tatiiħaj a kawas. saka to~usa a po~uɾo~uʔi,mitapo~uħaj .o~uniniʔi,mifaħfaħ to~u o~uniħ no~u pinaɾo~uma itini i o~umao~umaħan. sairən no~u ʦikawasaj ta mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u mikariʡaŋaj to~u pinaɾo~uma no~u o~umaħ. saka to~usa po~uɾo~uʡira ko~u ʦəʦajʔi,pasao~uro~uŋan.o~uniniʔi, awaajto~u ko~u aŋiɾ to~una ħaɾafin ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. o~u papatiko~uən ʦiŋra a pakiʔməɾ to~u tirəŋ to~u sakatanəktək no~u tirəŋ. saka to~usa po~uɾo~uʡira ko~u to~usaʔi,pasawaʡəran.o~u nikaʔʦa ka ʡiməɾ i piħafajan saka,maɾifawa ko~u tijaɬ~ɮ.saka, mipo~uħpo~uħ to~unini a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa nira. o~u kawas no~u ʦikawasaj,o~ujaʡafaŋ naŋraʔi,ʦi afo~uwakaj, ʦi ʦiŋaʦiŋaw ato~u ro~umaro~uma. o~u tatato~ujən no~u ʦikawasaj a misair to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaajʔi, o~u papaħ no~u ʡaɬ~ɮijam ato~u papaħ no~u ɾo~uʡo~uħ. o~u siwaɾaan ko~u piparo~uan to~u ʔpaħ to~u sapito~uripəs naŋrra.
S.FORM: == Cikawasay == o cicawasay hananay^ i,malecad to ising no aniniay ko tatodonng no piharateng no iti:ay'ayho a'amis a tamdaw.nawhani,o mamiadah to adadaay ko demak no cikawasay.saka ,ano ira ko adadaay a tamdaw^ i,tangsol saan a mitahidang to cikawasay a misalising a papiadah to adadaay a tamdaw. Nikawrira ,onini a cikawasay^ i,caay ka o nanilongocan nira ko sakacikawas nira. O kawas ko cu^cu sanay a mirawod saan i tamdaw a pa'araw. papitodongen nira ko tamdaw a papisakero' to kero' nira a misatakodtakod a romadiw.ano cima ko pakatodongay a tamdaw to kero ato radiw nira^ i,o raan a tamdaw ko kaolahan nira a pasifana' to sapitahidang noya tamdaw i cingranan a masakero.itini i pisakro'an nangra a pasifana' ko kawas toya tamdaw tono kawas a sowal.tona ira a misaraoraod sa kona kawas toya kaolahan nira a tamdaw saka,samatiya sato o malawidongay cangra a manganga'ay. Yo ira sato ko adadaay a tamdaw i paro no loma' nira^i, tahidangen nira koya kawas a milongoc to sapiadahaw nira, saka tangsol saan a ira koya kawas a miraod i cingranan ta masakero cangra a romadiw. Ta todongen kako a misa'ir to adadaay han noya kawas.saka, todong han nira ko demak noya cikawasay^i,maadah koya adadaay.saka, salipahak sato koya tamdaw.haloya kawas a lipahak toya tamdaw.saka,itiya a mapatorod no kawas ko tamdaw to sapiadah to adadaay a'icel. Nanoya, cingra sato ko 'arawen no finawlan a papiadah to adadaay. Cingra ko sa'ayaway a cikawasay no pangcah.mahaen ko lalengatan no saki ira no cikawasay no'amis. Oya kawas^i,o'afang noya cikawasay. Saka,ano awaay ko'afang no cikawasay^i,awaay ko^poc no cikawasay a miadah to adadaay. Nikawrira.caay ka lecad ko demak no 'afang. Saka, masasiroma' ko demak no cikawasay a miadah to adadaay. Ira ko pinapina a kasasiroma no demak no cikawasay a miadah to adadaay.malecad ato demak no ising konini, nawhani,adihay ko kasasiromaroma no adada.saka, mahaen to ko nika adihay no kasasiromaroma no demak no cikawasay. Ano ira ko adadaay no loma'^i,tayra i cikawasay a mi'araw.ta o cikawasay a tamdaw ko misifdihay.onini a pisifdih^i,o pikilim to tatapangan no adada ato samaanen ko demak ta maadah sanay. Ano mahapinang to ko pisifdih noya cikawasay^i,o cikawasay ko pahapinangay to nika sasamaanen ko demak saan. Saka cecay^i,maralisanay.onini a maralisan hananay^i, o cifa^detay a adada. O ci^doyay a adada konini. Tatolo, sapat ko cikawasay a midemak to ci^doyay a adada. Saka tosa^i, pasakawihan.mapolong koya cikawasay a misaliway ta midemak tonini. Saka tolo^i,mipangagang. O adada no fa^lohay a mihofocan a wawa;o sapifalicaw aca pangangan toya adadaay a wawa. Saka sepat^i,pakirikiri.onini^i,o saki mala^caay ko adada a tamdaw.mikapot koya adadaay i cikawasay i polong no demak nangra.sairen no cikawasay cingra. Saka lima^i,mipalio'c.o tatodong no pipalio'c no cikawasay ko demak tonini misair a mipuhpuh to tati'ih no ciadadaay a tamdaw. Saka ^nem^i,talakilang.o cecay no pipakalemed to picomod to fa^lohay a loma' Saka pito^i,pasa'orongan. Saka falo^i,mifodo'.o mitapalay to mapatayay. Saka siwa^i,pamalataw.adihay ko demak nonini a papimalataw hananay.o cecay^i,napakapatayay to tamdaw, ano citafaday a tamdaw ato namilooday a tamdaw^i,saerien no cikawasay cangra.o romasato,ano patireng to fa^lohay a kakomodan noniyaro'^I, pamalataw to sakafana'aw nira a paplo ato mafana' a mikowan to niyaro'. Saka mo^tep^I,o pa'aw'aw.onini a pa'aw'aw hananay^I,o todong no pitahidang to'adingo no mipalafangay a wawa ato talaomahay a wawa. Saka safaw cecay^I,pahemay.onini a pipahemay hananay^I,o pina'ang to kinayra no omah. Tala'ayaw a mina'ang^I,ira ko demak no cikawasay.o tatodongto no pisair no cikawasay to taknawan a mipakalemed to sakacikakaenen no loma'. Saka safaw tosa^I,pasma^ta'.onini^I,ano tatiih ko nisatiihay^I,papisair to cikawasay ta mapalasawad koya tatiihay a demak. Saka safaw tolo^I,misaodo'.onini^I,pipasadak to faniw . Saka safaw sepa't^I,milangaw.ano masiday ko maan a kakalimelaan a lalosidan,ano matakaw ko ^ekim ato tada^kim^I,papikilim han ko cikawasay to masidayay a maamaan. Ta ma'araw noya cikawasay ko cima ko mitakaway,ta ira icowa konini a lalosidan saan. Saka safaw lima^i.mifaliloh.onini^I,mifafah to tatiih no loma'.tinako sa^I,ci'iro koya loma';mipadoka' to cimacimaan^I,sahto o tatiihay a demak ko iraay noya loma',ta tahidangen ko cikawasay a papifahfah to tatiih no loma'. Saka safaw ^nem^I,niwatid. Ano ira ko mapatayay^I, mararom sa ko faloco' no loma'.caay ka hinom ko faloco' tona cimapatayay ko loma'. Ta tahidangen ko cikawasay a papifahfah tonini a rarom no paro no loma'. Saka safaw pito^i,sakap.onini a sakap hananay^i,o halafinay a doka' ato congras. Tahidangen ko cikawasay a papicepcep toya doka' ano^ca'I o congras ta mapasadak noya cikawasay koya mitngeday I o^o'. Saka safaw falo^I,pakawas.onini a pakawas hananay^I, halafinay a adada;malawaco ko tileng to nika adada. Ta papisairen to cikawasay.pakawas hananay konini a demak. Saka safaw siwa^I,mifahfah.mapolong ko finawlan a masadak a midemak tonini a papifahfah to tatiihay a kawas hananay .onini^I,o carawcaraw,o tofotofo ato romaroma.saka,misoni a ma^min ko kalo loma' a dodang ato takinkingan. Ta matalaw toya soni koya tatiihay a kawas. Saka tosa a polo^I,mitapohay .onini^i,mifahfah to onih no pinaloma itini i omaomahan. Sairen no cikawasay ta mapalasawad ko mikari'angay to pinaloma no omah. Saka tosa polo'ira ko cecay^I,pasaorongan.onini^i, awaayto ko angil tona halafin ko adada. O papatikoen cingra a paki^mel to tireng to sakatanektek no tireng. Saka tosa polo'ira ko tosa^I,pasawa'eran.o nika^ca ka 'imel i pihafayan saka,malifawa ko tiyad.saka, mipohpoh tonini a adada nira. O kawas no cikawasay,oya'afang nangra^i,ci afowakay, ci cingacingaw ato romaroma. O tatatoyen no cikawasay a misair to adadaay^i, o papah no 'adiyam ato papah no lo'oh. O siwalaan ko piparoan to ^pah to sapitoripes nangrra.
S.PHON: == ʦikawasaj == o~u ʦiʦawasaj ħananajʔ i,maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u isiŋ no~u aniniaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~unŋ no~u piħaratəŋ no~u iti:ajʡajħo~u aʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw.nawħani,o~u mamiaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦikawasaj.saka ,ano~u ira ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮawʔ i,taŋso~uɾ saan a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ʦikawasaj a misaɾisiŋ a papiaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. nikawrira ,o~unini a ʦikawasajʔ i,ʦaaj ka o~u naniɾo~uŋo~uʦan nira ko~u sakaʦikawas nira. o~u kawas ko~u ʦo~u~uʔʦo~u~u sanaj a mirawo~uɬ~ɮ saan i tamɬ~ɮaw a paʡaraw. papito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən nira ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a papisakəro~uʡ to~u kəro~uʡ nira a misatako~uɬ~ɮtako~uɬ~ɮ a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw.ano~u ʦima ko~u pakato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kəro~u ato~u raɬ~ɮiw niraʔ i,o~u raan a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kao~uɾaħan nira a pasifanaʡ to~u sapitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~uja tamɬ~ɮaw i ʦiŋranan a masakəro~u.itini i pisakro~uʡan naŋra a pasifanaʡ ko~u kawas to~uja tamɬ~ɮaw to~uno~u kawas a so~uwaɾ.to~una ira a misarao~urao~uɬ~ɮ sa ko~una kawas to~uja kao~uɾaħan nira a tamɬ~ɮaw saka,samatija sato~u o~u maɾawiɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦaŋra a maŋaŋaʡaj. jo~u ira sato~u ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ niraʔi, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən nira ko~uja kawas a miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sapiaɬ~ɮaħaw nira, saka taŋso~uɾ saan a ira ko~uja kawas a mirao~uɬ~ɮ i ʦiŋranan ta masakəro~u ʦaŋra a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw. ta to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən kako~u a misaʡir to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ħan no~uja kawas.saka, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħan nira ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~uja ʦikawasajʔi,maaɬ~ɮaħ ko~uja aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj.saka, saɾipaħak sato~u ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw.ħaɾo~uja kawas a ɾipaħak to~uja tamɬ~ɮaw.saka,itija a mapato~uro~uɬ~ɮ no~u kawas ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u sapiaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj aʡiʦəɾ. nano~uja, ʦiŋra sato~u ko~u ʡarawən no~u finawɾan a papiaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. ʦiŋra ko~u saʡajawaj a ʦikawasaj no~u paŋʦaħ.maħaən ko~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u saki ira no~u ʦikawasaj no~uʡamis. o~uja kawasʔi,o~uʡafaŋ no~uja ʦikawasaj. saka,ano~u awaaj ko~uʡafaŋ no~u ʦikawasajʔi,awaaj ko~uʔpo~uʦ no~u ʦikawasaj a miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. nikawrira.ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʡafaŋ. saka, masasiro~umaʡ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦikawasaj a miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj. ira ko~u pinapina a kasasiro~uma no~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦikawasaj a miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj.maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ato~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u isiŋ ko~unini, nawħani,aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa.saka, maħaən to~u ko~u nika aɬ~ɮiħaj no~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦikawasaj. ano~u ira ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj no~u ɾo~umaʡʔi,tajra i ʦikawasaj a miʡaraw.ta o~u ʦikawasaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u misifɬ~ɮiħaj.o~unini a pisifɬ~ɮiħʔi,o~u pikiɾim to~u tatapaŋan no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ato~u samaanən ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ta maaɬ~ɮaħ sanaj. ano~u maħapinaŋ to~u ko~u pisifɬ~ɮiħ no~uja ʦikawasajʔi,o~u ʦikawasaj ko~u paħapinaŋaj to~u nika sasamaanən ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak saan. saka ʦəʦajʔi,maraɾisanaj.o~unini a maraɾisan ħananajʔi, o~u ʦifaʔɬ~ɮətaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. o~u ʦiʔɬ~ɮo~ujaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ko~unini. tato~uɾo~u, sapat ko~u ʦikawasaj a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u ʦiʔɬ~ɮo~ujaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. saka to~usaʔi, pasakawiħan.mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~uja ʦikawasaj a misaɾiwaj ta miɬ~ɮəmak to~unini. saka to~uɾo~uʔi,mipaŋa*aŋ. o~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u faʔɾo~uħaj a miħo~ufo~uʦan a wawa;o~u sapifaɾiʦaw aʦa paŋaŋan to~uja aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a wawa. saka səpatʔi,pakirikiri.o~uniniʔi,o~u saki maɾaʔʦaaj ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a tamɬ~ɮaw.mikapo~ut ko~uja aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj i ʦikawasaj i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak naŋra.sairən no~u ʦikawasaj ʦiŋra. saka ɾimaʔi,mipaɾio~uʡʦ.o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u pipaɾio~uʡʦ no~u ʦikawasaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak to~unini misair a mipo~u~uħpo~u~uħ to~u tatiʡiħ no~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. saka ʔnəmʔi,taɾakiɾaŋ.o~u ʦəʦaj no~u pipakaɾəməɬ~ɮ to~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u faʔɾo~uħaj a ɾo~umaʡ saka pito~uʔi,pasaʡo~uro~uŋan. saka faɾo~uʔi,mifo~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ.o~u mitapaɾaj to~u mapatajaj. saka siwaʔi,pamaɾataw.aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~unini a papimaɾataw ħananaj.o~u ʦəʦajʔi,napakapatajaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u ʦitafaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u namiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮawʔi,saəriən no~u ʦikawasaj ʦaŋra.o~u ro~umasato~u,ano~u patirəŋ to~u faʔɾo~uħaj a kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~unijaro~uʡʔi, pamaɾataw to~u sakafanaʡaw nira a papɾo~u ato~u mafanaʡ a miko~uwan to~u nijaro~uʡ. saka mo~uʔtəpʔi,o~u paʡawʡaw.o~unini a paʡawʡaw ħananajʔi,o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u no~u mipaɾafaŋaj a wawa ato~u taɾao~umaħaj a wawa. saka safaw ʦəʦajʔi,paħəmaj.o~unini a pipaħəmaj ħananajʔi,o~u pinaʡaŋ to~u kinajra no~u o~umaħ. taɾaʡajaw a minaʡaŋʔi,ira ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦikawasaj.o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋto~u no~u pisair no~u ʦikawasaj to~u taknawan a mipakaɾəməɬ~ɮ to~u sakaʦikakaənən no~u ɾo~umaʡ. saka safaw to~usaʔi,pasmaʔtaʡ.o~uniniʔi,ano~u tatiiħ ko~u nisatiiħajʔi,papisair to~u ʦikawasaj ta mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~uja tatiiħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. saka safaw to~uɾo~uʔi,misao~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ.o~uniniʔi,pipasaɬ~ɮak to~u faniw . saka safaw səpaʡtʔi,miɾaŋaw.ano~u masiɬ~ɮaj ko~u maan a kakaɾiməɾaan a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan,ano~u matakaw ko~u ʔəkim ato~u taɬ~ɮaʔkimʔi,papikiɾim ħan ko~u ʦikawasaj to~u masiɬ~ɮajaj a maamaan. ta maʡaraw no~uja ʦikawasaj ko~u ʦima ko~u mitakawaj,ta ira iʦo~uwa ko~unini a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan saan. saka safaw ɾimaʔi.mifaɾiɾo~uħ.o~uniniʔi,mifafaħ to~u tatiiħ no~u ɾo~umaʡ.tinako~u saʔi,ʦiʡiro~u ko~uja ɾo~umaʡ;mipaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ to~u ʦimaʦimaanʔi,saħto~u o~u tatiiħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u iraaj no~uja ɾo~umaʡ,ta taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ko~u ʦikawasaj a papifaħfaħ to~u tatiiħ no~u ɾo~umaʡ. saka safaw ʔnəmʔi,niwatiɬ~ɮ. ano~u ira ko~u mapatajajʔi, mararo~um sa ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u ɾo~umaʡ.ʦaaj ka ħino~um ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~una ʦimapatajaj ko~u ɾo~umaʡ. ta taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ko~u ʦikawasaj a papifaħfaħ to~unini a raro~um no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ. saka safaw pito~uʔi,sakap.o~unini a sakap ħananajʔi,o~u ħaɾafinaj a ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ato~u ʦo~uŋras. taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ko~u ʦikawasaj a papiʦəpʦəp to~uja ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ano~uʔʦaʡi o~u ʦo~uŋras ta mapasaɬ~ɮak no~uja ʦikawasaj ko~uja mitŋəɬ~ɮaj i o~uʔo~uʡ. saka safaw faɾo~uʔi,pakawas.o~unini a pakawas ħananajʔi, ħaɾafinaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa;maɾawaʦo~u ko~u tiɾəŋ to~u nika aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. ta papisairən to~u ʦikawasaj.pakawas ħananaj ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak. saka safaw siwaʔi,mifaħfaħ.mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u finawɾan a masaɬ~ɮak a miɬ~ɮəmak to~unini a papifaħfaħ to~u tatiiħaj a kawas ħananaj .o~uniniʔi,o~u ʦarawʦaraw,o~u to~ufo~uto~ufo~u ato~u ro~umaro~uma.saka,miso~uni a maʔmin ko~u kaɾo~u ɾo~umaʡ a ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮaŋ ato~u takinkiŋan. ta mataɾaw to~uja so~uni ko~uja tatiiħaj a kawas. saka to~usa a po~uɾo~uʔi,mitapo~uħaj .o~uniniʔi,mifaħfaħ to~u o~uniħ no~u pinaɾo~uma itini i o~umao~umaħan. sairən no~u ʦikawasaj ta mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u mikariʡaŋaj to~u pinaɾo~uma no~u o~umaħ. saka to~usa po~uɾo~uʡira ko~u ʦəʦajʔi,pasao~uro~uŋan.o~uniniʔi, awaajto~u ko~u aŋiɾ to~una ħaɾafin ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. o~u papatiko~uən ʦiŋra a pakiʔməɾ to~u tirəŋ to~u sakatanəktək no~u tirəŋ. saka to~usa po~uɾo~uʡira ko~u to~usaʔi,pasawaʡəran.o~u nikaʔʦa ka ʡiməɾ i piħafajan saka,maɾifawa ko~u tijaɬ~ɮ.saka, mipo~uħpo~uħ to~unini a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa nira. o~u kawas no~u ʦikawasaj,o~ujaʡafaŋ naŋraʔi,ʦi afo~uwakaj, ʦi ʦiŋaʦiŋaw ato~u ro~umaro~uma. o~u tatato~ujən no~u ʦikawasaj a misair to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaajʔi, o~u papaħ no~u ʡaɬ~ɮijam ato~u papaħ no~u ɾo~uʡo~uħ. o~u siwaɾaan ko~u piparo~uan to~u ʔpaħ to~u sapito~uripəs naŋrra.
